heading: Use of sampling
label: 195 Use of sampling
text: Except for the determination of population for purposes of apportionment of Representatives in Congress among the several States, the Secretary shall, if he considers it feasible, authorize the use of the statistical method known as “sampling” in carrying out the provisions of this title.
notes: Amendments1976— substituted “for purposes of apportionment of Representatives in Congress among the several States, the Secretary shall, if he considers it feasible” for “for apportionment purposes, the Secretary may, where he deems it appropriate”.Pub. L. 94–521
Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–521section 17 of Pub. L. 94–521section 1 of this titleOct. 17, 1976
